view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email opened status is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email opened status is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for branching logic by referencing the condition step 'if_opened' in the marketing campaign. This step explicitly checks if an email was opened and directs the flow accordingly to either 'send_offer' or 'send_reminder', which directly aligns with the requirement of performing different actions based on the email's opened status. The evidence from the prior steps confirms that this branching logic is implemented and functioning as intended.
